structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State Parallel Fan Operation for ASHRAE 62.1 Ventilation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling, Occupied Mode, ventilation according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Voz - 0.5*Pfan-z; stop when primary airflow > Voz. Set fan airflow rate setpoint = Voz - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State Parallel Fan Operation for California Title 24 Ventilation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling, Occupied Mode, ventilation according to California Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Zone-Abs-OA-min - 0.5*Pfan-z; stop when primary airflow > Zone-Abs-OA-min. Set fan airflow rate setpoint = Zone-Abs-OA-min - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Zone State Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Zone State Parallel Fan Operation for ASHRAE 62.1 Ventilation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband, ventilation according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run parallel fan if active primary airflow setpoint < Voz. Set fan airflow rate setpoint = Voz - active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State Parallel Fan Airflow Reset (50-100% Heating Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 50% to 100% heating loop output, reset parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating, heating loop output 50% to 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset parallel fan airflow setpoint linearly from deadband airflow setpoint (at 50%) to Pfan-htgmax (at 100%).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).

evidence_quote: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).
evidence_text: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Coil Modulation to Maintain Discharge Temperature Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating coil active
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate heating coil to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint. Do not control heating directly from zone temperature loop.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).
evidence_text: 5.8.5.4. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at the primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured primary airflow at primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF, airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes while fan is OFF
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position 0%, airflow sensor reading > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes, fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper at 0%, airflow > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.6.5. Leaking Damper. If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: 5.8.6.5. Leaking Damper. If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force damper full closed/open, force heating to off/closed, turn fan on/off, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning or testing
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches for the listed overrides.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify software switches exist and function for each override.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to off/closed, f. turn fan on/off, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: 5.8.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to off/closed, f. turn fan on/off, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: 5.8.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to off/closed, f. turn fan on/off, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: System Requests - Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period; else if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests; else if Cooling Loop > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Various conditions based on zone temperature deviation and cooling loop output
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send requests as specified.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.8.1. Cooling SAT Reset Requests a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: 5.8.8.1. Cooling SAT Reset Requests a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: 5.8.8.1. Cooling SAT Reset Requests a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: System Requests - Static Pressure Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute; else if < 70% of setpoint and damper > 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests; else if damper > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Various conditions based on airflow deviation and damper position
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send requests as specified.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.8.2. Static Pressure Reset Requests a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: 5.8.8.2. Static Pressure Reset Requests a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: 5.8.8.2. Static Pressure Reset Requests a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot-Water Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If there is a hot-water coil, send 3 requests if DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 5 minutes; else if 8.3°C (15°F) less for 5 minutes, send 2 requests; else if HW valve > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%; else send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send requests as specified.

Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating-Hot Water Plant Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: System Requests - Heating-Hot Water Plant Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If there is a hot-water coil and a heating hot-water plant, send a heating hot-water plant request as follows: if HW valve position > 95%, send 1 request until < 10%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: HW valve position > 95%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 1 request until HW valve position < 10%; otherwise send 0 requests.

If the HW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less than 10%. b. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Pfan-z Definition
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Pfan-z is the lowest rate at which the fan will operate when it is turned on but has the lowest possible speed signal from the BAS.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints used in control logic vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group. Table 5.8.4 defines endpoints for Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, and Unoccupied modes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode changes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Use endpoints from Table 5.8.4 based on Zone Group mode.
